use_cases: Landing page header with headline and call-to-action buttons
Product or feature showcase section for SaaS applications
Marketing page entry point with gradient backgrounds
Onboarding or signup hero section for web applications
ai_summary: A landing page hero section from the larsen66 design system featuring gradient backgrounds, compelling headlines, and call-to-action buttons. Designed for SaaS and product marketing pages, this composite component combines typography, visual elements, and interactive buttons to drive user conversion with a modern, colorful aesthetic.
